source_pr.title: test: fix data race in status server
source_pr.body:

symptoms: test: fix data race in status server
failure_signature: test: fix data race in status server
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness was caused by a data race in the status server startup: goroutines serving HTTP/GRPC were referencing mutable `s.statusServer` / `s.grpcServer` fields, which can be reassigned during initialization, triggering races under concurrent execution (e.g., -race). This PR stabilizes it by using local server variables for the goroutines and only then assigning them to the struct fields, avoiding racy field access inside goroutines.
fix_pattern: Avoid capturing mutable struct fields in goroutines (use local variables and assign once) to prevent data races.

evidence: evidence: test: fix data race in status server
